writing_point_cards.claim: Roll the dice and match the challenges you face, from Unstable Stairways to Hall of Hieroglyphics, get powerful relics as you complete rooms and climb your way to the top of the pyramid and the ultimate prize: the Treasure Chamber containing the final riddle.
